findings.text: NAP-SRC-0046 is a PDF email from Callum Abbot to Napier accommodation residents, dated 09/03/2026, with an embedded .docx attachment named '2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx'.
The extracted text artifact (art-extracted-NAP-SRC-0046) does not contain the binary .docx content; only the filename and size are visible.
pdfdetach or Apache Tika is required to extract the embedded .docx from the PDF; the current extraction method (pdftotext) does not extract attachments.

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use pdfdetach or Apache Tika to extract the embedded file '2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx' from source NAP-SRC-0046 (PDF). Save the extracted .docx as candidate/T-B07-005-extract-docx-sub/2026-27_RA_Application_Pack.docx. If pdfdetach is available, run: pdfdetach -save 1 -o <output_path> <input_pdf>. If Tika is available, use its attachment extraction feature. Report success or failure.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract embedded .docx from NAP-SRC-0046 using pdfdetach or Tika

summary: Source NAP-SRC-0046 is a PDF email with an embedded .docx attachment (2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx). The extracted text confirms the attachment but does not contain the .docx binary. The task requires pdfdetach or Apache Tika to extract the embedded file. No extraction artifact was produced; a follow-up task is proposed.

uncertainties.reason: No tool availability information provided in context.
uncertainties.text: Whether pdfdetach or Tika is available in the harness environment for extracting the embedded .docx.
